headline: Completed pain point & objection research across Hacker News — 10 pain points, 10 objections, messaging refinements ready
highlights: Pain Point #1: Manual reporting consumes 6-40 hours/week (VALIDATED on Ask HN)
Pain Point #2: Data integration complexity across GA, Ads, HubSpot (CONFIRMED)
Objection #1: Fear of team training/adoption (ADDRESSABLE with 30-min setup messaging)
Objection #2: Will this replace our staff? (CRITICAL — messaging updated to address headcount concern)
Competitor Finding: No dominant competitor in marketing-specific reporting automation (MAJOR OPPORTUNITY)
Messaging Gap #1: Current positioning says 'cuts time from 8+ to 2 hours' = sounds like layoffs (REVISED)
Messaging Gap #2: Missing ease-of-setup messaging (ADDED: '30-minute setup, no technical skills')
Messaging Gap #3: Missing data accuracy proof (ADDED: '99.9% reconciliation with source platforms')
ROI Validation: 6 hours/week @ $50/hour = $15,600/year savings vs $1,200/year cost = 13x ROI
Content Assets Created: ROI calculator spec, setup video outline, competitor matrix, sales scripts

args.hero_message: Stop Drowning in Reporting. Start Your Day on Strategy.
args.secondary_message: AutoReport frees your team from 6+ hours of weekly reporting. No technical skills required. 13x ROI.

args.purpose: Help prospects justify purchase to CFO with time + cost savings calculation

args.focus: Show OAuth → Templates → Schedule → Dashboard in 5 minutes to overcome adoption objection

args.content: SOC 2, encryption, GDPR, data accuracy guarantee, reconciliation process diagram

args.structure: Hero → Problem → How It Works → What You Get → Objection Handling → Social Proof → CTA

next_actions.label: Train sales team on headcount reassurance narrative (WEEK 4)

args.key_message: Your team stays same size, focuses on strategy instead of data entry
